text:
Market today: Futures are up, signaling a positive start. However, your core chip holdings face headwinds from Nvidia's AI rack system delay and a confirmed pre-holiday slump.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down nearly 29% and flagged SELL; it's a leveraged product on margin. SPAL, another new leveraged ETF, is down almost 10%. QQQI is flagged TRIM.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the chip sector for further weakness or signs of recovery. Monitor your leveraged ETFs closely, as margin amplifies any drops.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged and underperforming chip positions.
plays: Your SOXL is down nearly 29% and flagged SELL. Its stop at 200 is already breached. Re-evaluate this leveraged position given the deep drawdown.
Scanner says TRIM for QQQI. Consider reducing your QQQI position to manage risk, especially given overall market uncertainty.
The scanner shows a BUY setup for XLK (tech ETF) at 179.47-179.14 with a stop at 178.4. This could be a new position if you want to add broader tech exposure.
